hero_eyebrow: Preventing abuse against girls and young women in Brazil
hero_subtitle: Nova Path works every day to prevent abuse against girls and young women in Brazil through safe shelter, trauma-informed care, family support, and long-term reintegration.
donate_subtitle: Donations are saved to your account and reflected in the website reporting data.
donate_confirm_submit: Are you sure you want to donate {{amount}}?
donate_amount_error: Enter a valid amount greater than 0.
donate_unauthorized: You are not authorized to submit donations from this account.
donate_load_history_error: Failed to load your donation history.
donate_footer_note: Need records for accounting? Visit the admin donations table or contact finance.
donate_who_intro: Your gift supports anonymized survivor care across Brazil while protecting personal identity and case confidentiality.
donate_who_1: Emergency safe shelter for girls and young women escaping abuse.
donate_who_2: Daily counseling, legal advocacy, and social-worker follow-up.
donate_who_3: Education and reintegration support for long-term safety and independence.
donate_success_popup: Thank you for your donation to Nova Path. Your contribution of {{amount}} helps us protect girls and young women in Brazil.
donor_load_error: Failed to load donor dashboard data.
donor_dashboard_intro: Your support helps Nova Path protect girls and young women in Brazil from abuse. Our teams work each day with safe shelter, trauma-informed counseling, home follow-ups, and legal advocacy so survivors can recover with dignity and safety.
donor_dashboard_thank_you: You are part of this work every day.
donor_helped_people_caption: Shared as a safe, rounded estimate to protect privacy.
donor_safehouse_caption: Secure locations funded by supporters like you.
donor_community_caption: A growing donor community standing against abuse.
donor_dashboard_where_intro: We share only high-level information in the donor dashboard so no survivor can be identified.
donor_dashboard_where_1: Crisis response: immediate transport, secure intake, and emergency shelter operations.
donor_dashboard_where_2: Care and protection: counseling sessions, case management, and legal coordination.
donor_dashboard_where_3: Long-term recovery: education continuity, family reunification support, and reintegration monitoring.
admin_dashboard_subtitle: Organization-wide analytics: residents, donations, social media, and reintegration outcomes.
admin_load_error: Failed to load dashboard data. Please ensure you are logged in.
caseload_search_name_case: Search by name or case number
caseload_error_unauthorized: Session expired or unauthorized. Please log in again.
resident_detail_confirm_edit: Are you sure you want to edit this resident's information?
resident_detail_confirm_save: Save changes to this resident record?
resident_detail_confirm_delete: Permanently delete this resident? This cannot be undone.
resident_detail_save_error: Unable to save changes. Check required fields and try again.
donors_error_unauthorized: Not authorized. Sign out and sign in again so your session uses a real server token (demo login now talks to the API).
donors_error_network: Cannot reach the API. Start the backend and ensure VITE_API_BASE_URL matches it (default http://localhost:5007).
social_media_subtitle_prefix: Live charts from your database: what to post, which platforms, posting cadence, timing, and donation referrals vs engagement. Data from
social_media_error_load: Unable to load social media analytics from the database.
social_media_section_1_hint: Average donation referrals by post type (types with at least 8 posts).
social_media_section_2b_hint: Share of posts with referral count or a linked gift (ReferralPostId).
social_media_section_3_hint: Line shows weekly volume over time.
social_media_section_4a_hint: Average donation referrals by post hour.
social_media_section_5_hint: Blue: avg donation referrals. Orange: engagement rate scaled to the same vertical scale for comparison.
social_media_section_6_hint: Top combinations by average donation referrals.
reset_subtitle: Step 1: Enter your email. Step 2: Set your new password.
reset_continue_info: Continue to set a new password for this email.
reset_email_password_required: Email and new password are required.
reset_success: Password reset successful. You can sign in now.
impact_story_1_text: A survivor entered care, completed a safety plan, and reconnected with school support without revealing identifying details.
impact_story_2_text: Through consistent counseling sessions and advocacy, a young person regained routines and confidence over time.
impact_story_3_text: With coordinated follow-ups and family engagement, a case progressed toward reintegration with ongoing monitoring.
impact_support_recovery_text: Donations fund safe housing, clinical support, education planning, and reintegration services. All public reporting is anonymized.
impact_load_error: Unable to load impact data right now.
pillar_safehouse_body: Nine secure locations providing immediate shelter, counseling, and long-term housing pathways for families in crisis.
pillar_visitation_body: Trained specialists conduct proactive, compassionate visits to at-risk families - identifying needs before they become emergencies.
pillar_process_body: End-to-end case documentation ensures continuity of care, legal compliance, and transparent reporting to stakeholders and donors.
section_subtitle: Every Nova Path program is built to stop abuse before it escalates and to protect girls and young women in Brazil every single day.
